description: Multiple unspecified vulnerabilities in Oracle E-Business Suite 11.5.10.2 allow remote attackers to affect confidentiality via unknown vectors related to the (1) Oracle Application Object Library (APP02) and (2) Oracle Applications Manager (APP04).
